parsed_review.summary: CP00-600 is a clean, descriptor-only closeout pack covering RP19.P07.M03.S11-S20 (10 units, risk A), and its pack-level claim is fully supported by what is inspectable. Scope is consistent across closeout-pack-plan.json, the manifest, the contract (current_pack, cp600_requirements, cp600_no_write_attestation, p07_implementation_slice_descriptor, and the last historical_pack_binding), and CLIENT_PORTAL_CORE_CP600_PACK_BINDING: upstream CP00-599, next CP00-601 at RP19.P07.M03.S21. Deliverable distribution (failure_recovery:3, implementation:1, hermes_evidence:2, fixture:1, test:2, security_audit:1) matches the plan's included_units exactly. All 7 declared public_exports exist in service.js/validators.js, are registered in registry.js, surfaced through index.js wildcard re-exports, and exercised by three substantive tests (binding coverage, descriptor-only rows, evidence/handoff authority). Every CP600 row is descriptor_only:true / runtime_execution:false / customer_safe_errors_only:true / raw_payload_included:false, and freezeCp600Result stamps the full no-write/no-runtime/no-leak attestation; validators and the rp19 validate script enforce these plus the authority boundary, and no runtime_execution:true, placeholders, or TODOs appear in the package. The authority boundary is honored throughout: claude_is_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, human approval required for runtime opening at CP00-601. Hermes is used only as a deterministic H19 evidence packet (no_write, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false), not product runtime. The manifest correctly holds production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, status:implemented_pending_review — the only claim asserted is the descriptor_verified flag, which is supported; no overclaim of runtime or enterprise trust. CP178+ hardening checks pass: readiness auth-preflight succeeded with valid JSON, invalid_review_blockers are defined, and post-review artifacts (raw-output.json, review-receipt.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are correctly absent at this pre-review stage and are produced downstream of this review per the hardening sequence. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
